title: Game News Round-Up
summary: Daily curated games-industry news digest for 12 July 2024.

items.title: **Tencent** is shutting down its free-to-play shooter **Synced **after just a year
bullets: Servers will be "retired" a year to the day the shooter was launched (September 8th)

items.title: **Frontier **has announced **Planet Coaster 2** for release this year
bullets: Releasing in autumn 2024 for PC, PlayStation 5, and Xbox Series S/X
Planet Coaster 2 will introduce several new features including new water attractions.

items.title: **Amazon Prime Gaming** is giving away 3 more PC games, including Suicide Squad
bullets: On Tuesday, July 16, Prime members will be able to claim Suicide Squad: Kill the Justice League, Chivalry 2, and Rise of the Tomb Raider at no additional cost.

items.title: **Embracer **has secured a new €600m ($652m) revolving credit facility with a two-year tenor
bullets: This new facility replaces its existing €420m ($456m) revolving credit facility, which matures in May 2025
Seven banks were involved in the transaction: BNP Paribas, Citibank, N.A., London Branch, DNB Bank ASA, Sweden Branch, J.P. Morgan SE, Nordea Bank Abp, filial i Sverige, SEB, and Swedbank AB (publ).

items.title: "Small number of roles" face potential redundancies at ** Splash Damage**
bullets: Roles at risk are mostly in operations, with development largely unaffected

items.title: **Stellar Blade** developer Shift Up raises $320m in IPO
bullets: Largest gaming IPO in South Korea in over two years, and the first of at least $50 million since 2021, when PUBG developer Krafton raised $3.8 billion.

items.title: UK Store **GAME** to end in-store pre-orders. Game Wallet to also end
bullets: As of 1st August, no new in-store pre-orders will be accepted and all existing pre-orders will be refunded for products set to be released after 31st January 2025.
Any existing pre-order or deposit for a product set to be launched before the end of January 2025 will still be honoured. There's no change to online pre-orders.
In a week's time, on 18th July, GAME Wallet customers will no longer be able to add new funds or gift cards. After 21st August, all GAME Wallet accounts will be closed.
